scripts.build: pnpm --filter @neuro/shared build && pnpm --filter @neuro/domain build && pnpm --filter @neuro/adapters build && pnpm --filter @neuro/contracts build && pnpm --filter @neuro/miniapp build && pnpm --filter @neuro/control-plane build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @neuro/shared lint && pnpm --filter @neuro/domain lint && pnpm --filter @neuro/adapters lint && pnpm --filter @neuro/contracts lint && pnpm --filter @neuro/miniapp lint && pnpm --filter @neuro/control-plane lint
